name: Overnight Cinnamon Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a greased bundt cake pan, layer the frozen dinner rolls.
2. Add the butterscotch pudding.
3. Sprinkle brown sugar over the pudding.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon over the brown sugar.
5. Pour melted butter over the cinnamon.
6. Scatter pecans on top.
7. Cover the pan with foil and a clean towel.
8. Allow to sit overnight.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake for 30 minutes. Serves 8 to 10.
